label: Fine for violation of prohibited AI practices (Art. 5)
trigger: Non-compliance with any prohibition in Art. 5(1)(a)-(h): placing on market, putting into service, or using a prohibited AI system
amount_or_description: Up to €35,000,000 or, if the offender is an undertaking, up to 7% of its total worldwide annual turnover for the preceding financial year, whichever is higher.
sme_startup_rule: For SMEs and start-ups, fines are subject to the same maximum percentages, but whichever of the two amounts is LOWER (more favourable to the SME).

label: Fine for violation of high-risk AI system obligations (operators, notified bodies)
trigger: Non-compliance with obligations imposed on operators (providers, deployers, importers, distributors, authorised representatives) under Art. 16, 22, 23, 24, 26, and on notified bodies; or with conditions for placing on market/service or use of high-risk AI systems
amount_or_description: Up to €15,000,000 or, if the offender is an undertaking, up to 3% of its total worldwide annual turnover for the preceding financial year, whichever is higher.
sme_startup_rule: For SMEs and start-ups, the lower of the two amounts applies.

label: Fine for providing incorrect, incomplete or misleading information to authorities
trigger: Supplying incorrect, incomplete or misleading information to notified bodies or national competent authorities in reply to a request
amount_or_description: Up to €7,500,000 or, if the offender is an undertaking, up to 1% of its total worldwide annual turnover for the preceding financial year, whichever is higher.
sme_startup_rule: For SMEs and start-ups, the lower of the two amounts applies.

label: Fine for EU institutions, bodies, offices and agencies violating this Regulation
trigger: Non-compliance with this Regulation by EU institutions, bodies, offices or agencies acting as providers or deployers
amount_or_description: Up to €1,500,000. The European Data Protection Supervisor has jurisdiction to impose fines on EU institutions.

label: Fine for violation of GPAI model obligations
trigger: Non-compliance with obligations for general-purpose AI model providers (Art. 53-55), including failure to maintain documentation, copyright compliance, training data summary, or systemic risk obligations
amount_or_description: Up to €15,000,000 or up to 3% of total worldwide annual turnover for the preceding financial year, whichever is higher. Same as Art. 99(4) tier.
sme_startup_rule: For SMEs and start-ups, the lower of the two amounts applies.
human_review_note: The exact penalty article for GPAI model violations specifically should be confirmed in the full text of Art. 99. The 3%/€15M tier is the most likely applicable tier based on operator obligations, but Art. 99 references specific article numbers that should be verified.
